title: AWS KMS Key Policy Evaluation
summary: Intermediate LAB teaching how AWS KMS key policies, IAM permissions, grants, encryption context, and organization guardrails combine to control cryptographic access.
objectives: Explain what a KMS key policy is
Differentiate KMS key policies from IAM identity policies
Explain why IAM allow alone may not be enough for KMS access
Understand KMS grants and encryption context
Understand how KMS policy design affects S3, EBS, RDS, Lambda, and Secrets Manager
Prepare learners for applied cloud data-protection and Principal LAB reasoning
